entries.description: lottie-web reference trace for the airbnb lottie-web ripple demo.

frames.rationale: First source frame records the initial browser-engine state.
Quarter-window sample catches animated precomposition and path state.
Mid-window sample catches transform interpolation and repeated geometry.
Late-window sample catches non-boundary animated state.
Last sampled source frame before the end checks terminal behavior.

witness.reason: Pinned lottie-web in Chromium produced this committed numeric source-intent trace for the wider corpus witness set.
